_comment_purpose: Operator-controlled configuration for New-ConfigSnapshot.ps1, Compare-ConfigSnapshots.ps1, and Invoke-DriftReport.ps1. Edit values below to suit your environment. Do not remove keys; set capture categories to false instead of deleting them.

output._comment: Directories for snapshot, diff, and report output. Paths may be absolute or relative to the repository root. These directories are excluded from version control by .gitignore.

retention._comment: Number of comparison snapshots to retain before the oldest is automatically removed. Baseline snapshots (label = 'baseline') are exempt from retention and are never automatically removed.

captureCategories._comment: Set any category to false to exclude it from snapshot capture. Excluding a category removes it from both snapshot output and drift comparison.

installedSoftwareOptions._comment: Win32_Product WMI queries can trigger Windows Installer self-repair on some systems. Set useWmiQuery to false to rely on registry enumeration only, which is the safer default.

severityThresholds._comment: Severity classification applied by Invoke-DriftReport.ps1. Categories not listed default to NOTABLE for any change and CRITICAL for any addition of a privileged or security-relevant entry.

adminGroupNames._comment: Local group names treated as privileged for severity escalation purposes. Membership changes to these groups are always classified CRITICAL regardless of the localUsers threshold above.

logging._comment: Controls script execution logging. Logs record script start/end, errors, and category-level capture success/failure. Logs do not contain captured data itself.
